rules.note: Python source files under src/ are canonically placed; no action needed
Test files already under tests/ are canonically placed
Python test files not already under tests/ should be moved there
Markdown documentation already under docs/ is canonically placed
Shell scripts already under scripts/ are canonically placed
Shell scripts not already under scripts/ should be moved there
Standard root-level documentation files are canonically at project root
Loose markdown at project root (not covered by r7) should move to docs/
Numbered note files (notes1.md, notes22.md) are historical threads; archive them
Files starting with 'scratch' are temporary work artefacts; quarantine to .delete
Files starting with 'tmp' are temporary; quarantine to .delete

rules.pattern: Python files that do not import pytest and whose filename does not begin with 'test_' are not test files — do not move them to tests/ even if they are located adjacent to test files.
rules.note: RATIFIED via FLAG_NEW_RULE in run 2 — guards against moving utility helpers into tests/

quarantine_log.reason: Filename matches cruft pattern 'scratch*' configured in rule r10. File contents confirm: 3 uncommitted code fragments with no imports, no function definitions — confirmed scratch work.
Filename matches regex rule r9 (notes\d+\.md). File contents: design notes from early project phase, now superseded by ARCHITECTURE.md. Intellectual value preserved; no longer active reference.

pending_rule_candidates.pattern_observed: 3 files matching *.bench.py in project root with no covering rule (bench_auth.bench.py, bench_db.bench.py, bench_cache.bench.py)

suggested_rule.note: Python benchmark files identified by .bench.py suffix — proposed by TRIAGE in run 3

pending_rule_candidates.rationale: Observed 3 files with .bench.py suffix at project root, none covered by any active rule. Pattern suggests a benchmarking convention the project uses. Proposing a rule to route them to benchmarks/ directory.

notes: Python library project. Uses src/ layout with src/mylib/ as the package root. Tests live under tests/ with conftest.py at root. Documentation is in docs/ using Sphinx. Shell scripts in scripts/ (mainly CI helpers). Benchmarks emerging as a pattern — pending rule r13 for ratification in next run.
